metadata.title: 5 Foods That Are Secretly Destroying Your Health

claims.text: Microwave ovens destroy 90% of nutrients in food
claims.explanation: Multiple studies show microwaving retains similar or more nutrients than other cooking methods due to shorter cooking times.

sources.title: Harvard Health Publishing
sources.snippet: Microwave cooking retains more nutrients than some other methods...

claims.text: The WHO classified processed meat as a Group 1 carcinogen in 2015
claims.explanation: The IARC (part of WHO) classified processed meat as Group 1 in October 2015.

sources.title: WHO - IARC Monographs
sources.snippet: Processed meat classified as carcinogenic to humans (Group 1)...

claims.text: Eating bananas at night causes weight gain
claims.explanation: No strong evidence found. Weight gain depends on total caloric intake, not timing of specific foods.
claims.what_to_check_next: Look for clinical studies on meal timing and weight

transcript_preview: Hey guys, today I want to talk about five foods that are secretly destroying your health...
